category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Botswana) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Botswana Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入博茨瓦纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入波札那：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Botswana requirements: BOBS conformity and the BOS import mark, IEC 62133 cell safety, electrical safety, BOCRA radio type approval for wireless features, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer pathway. Botswana does not operate an EU-style horizontal battery or RoHS regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与博茨瓦纳要求对照：BOBS合格评定与BOS进口标志、IEC 62133电芯安全、电气安全、无线功能的BOCRA无线电型号核准、UN 38.3运输，以及本地进口商路径。博茨瓦纳没有欧盟式的横向电池法规或RoHS制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與波札那要求對照：BOBS合格評定與BOS進口標誌、IEC 62133電芯安全、電氣安全、無線功能的BOCRA無線電型號核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及本地進口商路徑。波札那沒有歐盟式的橫向電池法規或RoHS制度。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters targeting Botswana should plan for BOBS conformity assessment and the BOS import mark where the product is in scope, IEC 62133 cell-safety evidence, electrical-safety testing against BOS-adopted IEC/SANS standards, BOCRA type approval for any wireless feature, UN 38.3 transport testing, and an in-country importer — none of which is satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification alone. Botswana has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation or RoHS regime.
answer_first.zh: 面向博茨瓦纳的中国锂电池及移动电源出口商应规划：在产品属管制范围时取得BOBS合格评定及BOS进口标志、IEC 62133电芯安全证据、依据BOS采纳的IEC/SANS标准进行电气安全测试、任何无线功能的BOCRA型号核准、UN 38.3运输测试，以及本地进口商——上述要求均无法仅凭中国GB 31241或CCC认证满足。博茨瓦纳没有欧盟式的横向电池法规或RoHS制度。
answer_first.zht: 面向波札那的中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商應規劃：在產品屬管制範圍時取得BOBS合格評定及BOS進口標誌、IEC 62133電芯安全證據、依據BOS採納的IEC/SANS標準進行電氣安全測試、任何無線功能的BOCRA型號核准、UN 38.3運輸測試，以及本地進口商——上述要求均無法僅憑中國GB 31241或CCC認證滿足。波札那沒有歐盟式的橫向電池法規或RoHS制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator or standards-body sources preferred (bobstandards.bw, bocra.org.bw, iec.ch, unece.org).
